description_long: This object is a whimsical, cartoon-like flower with a large, round, pale yellow face at its center, featuring a wide, expressive smile and two black oval eyes. Surrounding the face are six broad, rounded petals in a soft lavender color, arranged symmetrically around the center. The flower has two thin, black stick-like arms and legs, each ending in small, rounded hands and feet, giving it a playful, anthropomorphic appearance. The back of the flower is smooth and shows the same petal arrangement without facial features. The overall form is simple and stylized, with smooth, matte surfaces and no visible texture or fine botanical detail. This flower would stand out as a decorative or playful element in an urban park, playground, or themed public space.
description: A cartoonish flower with a smiling yellow face, six lavender petals, and stick-like arms and legs. Its playful, anthropomorphic design is smooth and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smiling yellow face, six lavender petals, and both arms and legs clearly.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the flower's flat, disc-like profile and the thickness of the petals and face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the yellow center and the symmetrical arrangement of the six lavender petals, with no facial features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the flatness and thickness of the petals and face, with arms and legs visible from the side.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, evenly spaced around the central face, with no visible overlap or layering. The arrangement is highly symmetrical, forming a whorl typical of many cartoon or stylized flowers.
